name: /pr-corpus-update aggregates per-source budget usage independently when invoked across multiple sources
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus && printf '{"a":{"used_today":1000},"b":{"used_today":99500}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source a --source b --estimated-tokens 1000 --budget .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'a:allowed=true' out.txt && grep -q 'b:allowed=false' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
